entities.name: Candidate
entities.context: The person progressing through the three-step funnel, incurring costs at each stage

entities.name: Funnel structure
entities.context: Three-step process: resume upload → story collection → job-specific application

entities.name: Resume analysis
entities.context: Step 1 process where system incurs costs to analyze candidate resume

entities.name: Stories
entities.context: Narrative content candidates provide in Step 2, requiring processing and embedding

entities.name: Job application
entities.context: Step 3 where candidate applies to specific role triggering expensive alignment

entities.name: Alignment
entities.context: Expensive compute process matching ~30 decomposed role requirements against stories and resume

entities.name: Vibe check
entities.context: Comparatively cheap filtering mechanism to screen out misaligned applicants early

relationships.context: Step 1: Candidate upload triggers resume analysis costs
Step 2: Candidate provides multiple stories incurring processing costs
Step 3: Candidate applies to specific job triggering per-job-per-candidate costs
Job application triggers expensive alignment between requirements, stories, and resume
Vibe check filters candidates to prevent unnecessary costs from low-fit applicants
Vibe check serves as gatekeeper within the broader funnel to control costs
